message:
Running command: # Synthesis is running. Monitor for 30 more seconds to confirm steady progress
sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v2_full.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null
echo "---step progress---"
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v2/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V
echo "---log tail---"
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v2_full.log
